title: bouteloua triaena
intro: Bouteloua triaena, also known as Blue Grama Grass, is a perennial grass native to the Great Plains region of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Bouteloua triaena include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua triaena can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
